name: @forgeax/hello-physics
description: Physics integration demo (static ground + dynamic sphere free-fall + bounce) using createApp physics opts.

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle (dist/assets) shape is downstream of @forgeax/engine-app + @forgeax/engine-runtime sizes already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: physics smoke covers structural boot + WASM load, not GPU render path

bench.reason: physics demo exemplar; bench focus stays on @forgeax/engine-math and physics backends

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; this is the createApp physics integration exemplar
